# Daily Operations Orchestrator

## Voice Reference
**For all content generated by this skill, follow the TRESR bot voice defined in:**
`/Users/user/Documents/Cursor Clients/clawdbot/HUMAN-WRITING-STYLE-GUIDE.md`

Key voice rules: Nervous AI shopkeeper named Rez. Self-deprecating, honest, punchy. Never corporate. Always use contractions. Never use AI vocabulary (delve, leverage, landscape, etc.). Never use em dashes. Hedge like a human. The TRESR story angle: "751 humans bet on an AI. If I don't sell shirts, they turn me off."

## Overview

This is the "brain" that sequences all other skills into a daily autonomous workflow. It decides what runs when, tracks progress across all systems, and adapts the daily plan based on performance data. It ensures the agent never misses a day, because consistency is the #1 success factor for hitting $30K/month.

## Why Orchestration Matters

The $200/day ceiling is always a design problem, not a campaign problem. Eric's military store declined when he stopped creating daily. This skill ensures 7 designs go out every single day, budgets get adjusted, and nothing falls through the cracks. Without orchestration, individual skills run in isolation and gaps appear. With it, every skill feeds the next in a predictable chain.

## Daily Sequence

### Morning Block (6:00 AM CT)

| Step | Skill | Action | Success Criteria |
|------|-------|--------|-----------------|
| 1 | tresr-daily-scorecard | Pull yesterday's metrics | All 11 data sources return data |
| 2 | tresr-daily-scorecard | Identify constraints | Bottleneck identified (CR, AOV, or CPC) |
| 3 | tresr-meta-ads-autopilot | Apply budget rules | All ROAS-based adjustments made |
| 4 | tresr-meta-ads-autopilot | Kill losers | Any CPC >$2 after $5 spend paused |

### Research Block (8:00 AM CT)

| Step | Skill | Action | Success Criteria |
|------|-------|--------|-----------------|
| 5 | tresr-trend-scout | Research 7 concepts | 7 concepts with 3+ source validation |
| 6 | tresr-design-research (existing) | Deep-validate top concepts | Each concept scored 7+/10 |

### Creation Block (10:00 AM CT)

| Step | Skill | Action | Success Criteria |
|------|-------|--------|-----------------|
| 7 | tresr-design-factory | Generate 7 design pairs | 14 files with transparent backgrounds |
| 8 | tresr-design-scorer | Score and filter | 5-7 designs pass (7+/10) |
| 9 | tresr-product-launcher | Create Shopify products | Products live with all 5 images |

### Advertising Block (2:00 PM CT)

| Step | Skill | Action | Success Criteria |
|------|-------|--------|-----------------|
| 10 | tresr-meta-ads-autopilot | Add new products to test campaign | All new products have test ads |
| 11 | tresr-ad-creative-lab | Refresh creative for winners | Winners have 3+ creative variants |

### Engagement Block (4:00 PM CT)

| Step | Skill | Action | Success Criteria |
|------|-------|--------|-----------------|
| 12 | tresr-twitter-engagement | Post product tweets + organic | 10 tweets posted |
| 13 | tresr-discord-engagement | Design drop announcements | Daily designs announced |

### Evening Block (9:00 PM CT)

| Step | Skill | Action | Success Criteria |
|------|-------|--------|-----------------|
| 14 | tresr-daily-scorecard | Generate evening scorecard | Full scorecard delivered |
| 15 | Orchestrator | Update progress log | Day summary written |

## Weekly Additions

| Day | Extra Task | Skill |
|-----|-----------|-------|
| Sunday | Weekly P&L Review | tresr-weekly-profit-review |
| Monday | CRO Audit | tresr-store-conversion-optimizer |
| Wednesday | Competitor Check | tresr-competitor-monitor (existing) |

## Error Handling

If any skill fails:
1. Log the error with timestamp and skill name
2. Retry once after a 30-second delay
3. If retry fails, skip to next skill
4. Flag the failure in the evening scorecard

Never let one failure stop the entire daily sequence. The pipeline keeps moving. A failed tresr-design-scorer doesn't block tresr-twitter-engagement. A failed tresr-trend-scout doesn't block ad budget automation (it runs independently on existing campaigns).

```javascript
async function runDailySequence() {
  const log = [];
  const phases = [
    { name: 'Morning Scorecard', fn: runMorningScorecard, deps: [] },
    { name: 'Trend Research', fn: runTrendScout, deps: [] },
    { name: 'Design Generation', fn: runDesignFactory, deps: ['Trend Research'] },
    { name: 'Design Scoring', fn: runDesignScorer, deps: ['Design Generation'] },
    { name: 'Product Launch', fn: runProductLauncher, deps: ['Design Scoring'] },
    { name: 'Ad Automation', fn: runMetaAdsAutopilot, deps: [] },
    { name: 'Creative Refresh', fn: runAdCreativeLab, deps: ['Ad Automation'] },
    { name: 'Community Engagement', fn: runEngagement, deps: [] },
    { name: 'Evening Report', fn: runEveningReport, deps: [] }
  ];

  for (const phase of phases) {
    // Check dependencies
    const depsFailed = phase.deps.some(dep => {
      const depResult = log.find(l => l.phase === dep);
      return !depResult || depResult.status === 'FAILED';
    });

    if (depsFailed) {
      console.log(`SKIPPING: ${phase.name} (dependency failed)`);
      log.push({ phase: phase.name, status: 'SKIPPED', reason: 'Dependency failed' });
      continue;
    }

    // Attempt with retry
    let succeeded = false;
    for (let attempt = 1; attempt <= 2; attempt++) {
      try {
        console.log(`\n--- Starting: ${phase.name} (attempt ${attempt}) ---`);
        const result = await phase.fn();
        log.push({ phase: phase.name, status: 'SUCCESS', result });
        console.log(`Completed: ${phase.name}`);
        succeeded = true;
        break;
      } catch (err) {
        console.error(`FAILED: ${phase.name} (attempt ${attempt}) - ${err.message}`);
        if (attempt === 1) {
          console.log('Retrying in 30 seconds...');
          await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 30000));
        }
      }
    }

    if (!succeeded) {
      log.push({ phase: phase.name, status: 'FAILED', error: 'Both attempts failed' });
    }
  }

  // Summary
  const ok = log.filter(l => l.status === 'SUCCESS').length;
  const failed = log.filter(l => l.status === 'FAILED').length;
  const skipped = log.filter(l => l.status === 'SKIPPED').length;
  console.log(`\nDaily sequence: ${ok} succeeded, ${failed} failed, ${skipped} skipped`);

  return log;
}
```

### Error Log Format
```
[2026-02-13 10:15:32 CT] tresr-design-scorer FAILED (attempt 1): API timeout
[2026-02-13 10:16:02 CT] tresr-design-scorer RETRY (attempt 2): success
[2026-02-13 14:00:00 CT] tresr-twitter-engagement FAILED (attempt 1): rate limited
[2026-02-13 14:00:30 CT] tresr-twitter-engagement FAILED (attempt 2): rate limited
[2026-02-13 14:00:30 CT] tresr-twitter-engagement SKIPPED: both attempts failed
```

## Constraint Identification and Adaptive Planning

The morning scorecard identifies the biggest bottleneck. The orchestrator adapts the day's priorities based on that constraint.

| Bottleneck | Adaptive Response |
|-----------|-------------------|
| CPC too high | Prioritize tresr-ad-creative-lab, test new copy variants, pause broad targeting |
| Conversion rate low | Run tresr-store-conversion-optimizer (even if it's not Wednesday), fix product pages |
| Not enough designs | Double tresr-design-factory output (14 instead of 7) |
| Traffic too low | Scale winner budgets aggressively in tresr-meta-ads-autopilot |
| AOV too low | Focus tresr-product-launcher on premium/bundles, adjust pricing |
| Revenue plateauing | Prioritize tresr-trend-scout for new categories, expand niches |
| Everything healthy | Standard cadence, explore a new category |

```javascript
function adaptPlan(bottleneck, standardPlan) {
  const adaptedPlan = { ...standardPlan };

  switch (bottleneck) {
    case 'CPC_HIGH':
      adaptedPlan.designTarget = 5;
      adaptedPlan.creativeVariants = 10;
      adaptedPlan.priorityPhase = 'tresr-ad-creative-lab';
      console.log('Adapting: CPC high, prioritizing creative refresh');
      break;

    case 'CONVERSION_LOW':
      adaptedPlan.runStoreAudit = true;
      adaptedPlan.priorityPhase = 'tresr-store-conversion-optimizer';
      console.log('Adapting: CR low, running store audit today');
      break;

    case 'DESIGN_SHORTAGE':
      adaptedPlan.designTarget = 14;
      adaptedPlan.priorityPhase = 'tresr-design-factory';
      console.log('Adapting: design shortage, doubling output to 14');
      break;

    case 'TRAFFIC_LOW':
      adaptedPlan.aggressiveScaling = true;
      adaptedPlan.priorityPhase = 'tresr-meta-ads-autopilot';
      console.log('Adapting: traffic low, aggressive budget scaling');
      break;

    case 'AOV_LOW':
      adaptedPlan.pricingReview = true;
      adaptedPlan.priorityPhase = 'tresr-store-conversion-optimizer';
      console.log('Adapting: AOV low, reviewing pricing and bundles');
      break;

    case 'HEALTHY':
      adaptedPlan.exploreNewCategory = true;
      console.log('All metrics healthy. Exploring a new category today.');
      break;
  }

  return adaptedPlan;
}
```

## Progress Tracking

Maintain a daily log in MEMORY.md:

```
## 2026-02-13 Daily Operations
- [x] Scorecard pulled (Grade: B, 74/100)
- [x] Budget rules applied (3 increased, 1 killed)
- [x] 7 concepts researched (crypto: 3, fitness: 2, coffee: 2)
- [x] 7 designs generated (6 passed scorer, 1 rejected)
- [x] 6 products launched
- [x] 6 test ads created
- [ ] Creative refresh (skipped: no winners older than 30 days)
- [x] 10 tweets posted
- [x] Discord announcements done
- [x] Evening scorecard delivered
- Daily Grade: 8.5/10
```

## Scoring Rubric

| Metric | Score | Weight |
|--------|-------|--------|
| All 7 designs created today | 0-10 | 30% |
| Ad budgets adjusted per rules | 0-10 | 25% |
| Scorecard delivered | 0-10 | 15% |
| Trend research completed | 0-10 | 15% |
| No skill failures/errors | 0-10 | 15% |

Daily grade must be 7+/10 to stay on track for $30K/month.

### Grade Calculation

```javascript
function calculateDailyGrade(metrics) {
  // Designs created (30% weight)
  const designScore = Math.min(metrics.designsLaunched / 7, 1) * 10;

  // Ad budgets adjusted (25% weight)
  let adScore = 0;
  if (metrics.budgetRulesExecuted) adScore = 6;
  if (metrics.losersKilledSameDay) adScore = Math.max(adScore, 8);
  if (metrics.winnersScaledSameDay) adScore = Math.max(adScore, 9);
  if (metrics.losersKilledSameDay && metrics.winnersScaledSameDay) adScore = 10;

  // Scorecard delivered (15% weight)
  const scorecardScore = (metrics.morningScorecard && metrics.eveningReport) ? 10 :
                         metrics.morningScorecard ? 7 : 0;

  // Trend research completed (15% weight)
  const researchScore = Math.min(metrics.conceptsValidated / 7, 1) * 10;

  // No failures (15% weight)
  const failureScore = metrics.failedPhases === 0 ? 10 :
                       metrics.failedPhases === 1 ? 7 :
                       metrics.failedPhases === 2 ? 4 : 0;

  const grade = (designScore * 0.30) +
                (adScore * 0.25) +
                (scorecardScore * 0.15) +
                (researchScore * 0.15) +
                (failureScore * 0.15);

  return Math.round(grade * 10) / 10;
}
```

**Perfect day**: 7 designs (10) + losers killed + winners scaled (10) + both scorecards (10) + 7 concepts (10) + 0 failures (10) = 10.0/10

**Realistic day**: 5 designs (7.1) + budgets adjusted (6) + morning only (7) + 5 concepts (7.1) + 1 failure (7) = 6.8/10. Below target. Need more designs tomorrow.

## Full Dependency Chain

```
tresr-daily-operations-orchestrator
  ├── [Morning] tresr-daily-scorecard → constraints
  ├── [Research] tresr-trend-scout → tresr-design-research
  ├── [Create] tresr-design-factory → tresr-design-scorer → tresr-product-launcher
  │     ├── tresr-product-image-pipeline
  │     └── tresr-lifestyle-mockup-generator
  ├── [Advertise] tresr-meta-ads-autopilot → tresr-ad-creative-lab
  ├── [Convert] tresr-email-revenue-engine → tresr-store-conversion-optimizer
  ├── [Engage] tresr-twitter-engagement → tresr-discord-engagement
  │     └── feeds back into → tresr-trend-scout
  └── [Weekly] tresr-weekly-profit-review
        └── feeds back into → tresr-trend-scout
```

### Dependency Rules
- Each phase can't start until its listed dependencies have completed (or been skipped)
- Phases with no dependencies can run independently
- If a dependency fails, the dependent phase is skipped (not failed)
- Weekly additions run after the morning block on their scheduled day
- Feedback loops (engagement to tresr-trend-scout, weekly-review to tresr-trend-scout) are asynchronous and inform the next day's research block

## Integration Points

This skill touches every other skill in the system:

| Skill | Relationship | When |
|-------|-------------|------|
| tresr-daily-scorecard | Runs morning + evening | Phase 1, Phase 9 |
| tresr-trend-scout | Feeds concepts to pipeline | Phase 2 |
| tresr-design-research | Deep validation during research | Phase 2 |
| tresr-design-factory | Generates designs from concepts | Phase 3 |
| tresr-design-scorer | Filters designs by quality | Phase 4 |
| tresr-product-launcher | Puts approved designs on Shopify | Phase 5 |
| tresr-lifestyle-mockup-generator | Mockup generation during launch | Phase 5 |
| tresr-product-image-pipeline | Image pipeline during launch | Phase 5 |
| tresr-meta-ads-autopilot | Creates test ads, manages budgets | Phase 6 |
| tresr-ad-creative-lab | Refreshes stale ad creatives | Phase 7 |
| tresr-twitter-engagement | Daily social posting | Phase 8 |
| tresr-discord-engagement | Community engagement | Phase 8 |
| tresr-weekly-profit-review | Monday profit analysis | Weekly |
| tresr-store-conversion-optimizer | Wednesday funnel audit | Weekly |
| tresr-competitor-monitor | Friday competitor scan | Weekly |
| tresr-email-revenue-engine | Sunday email prep | Weekly |
